steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The passage reports two findings: white butterflies appeared more often on green flowers (butterfly color linked to behavior), and butterflies fed more often on cloudy days (weather conditions linked to behavior). The correct choice must reflect both factors.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — Weather conditions but not butterfly color: omits the finding about butterfly color. ✗
  • Choice B — Butterfly color but not weather conditions: omits the finding about weather conditions. ✗
  • Choice C — Neither butterfly color nor weather conditions: ignores both findings from the study. ✗
  • Choice D — Both butterfly color and weather conditions: explicitly includes both factors found in the research. ✓
That confirms D is correct.
